---
title: "data_analysis_products"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| mesage: false

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)   # clean_names(), tabyl()
library(skimr)     # skim() for fast EDA
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| message: false

enabled <- read_csv(
  "data/enabled.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

```

```{r}
#| label: sanity-check

glimpse(enabled)
dim(enabled)

# show column names (useful for writing later code)
names(enabled)
```

```{r}
#| label: check-price

# look at the first few unique values
enabled %>%
  distinct(price) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

# how many values are non-numeric?
enabled %>%
  summarise(
    pct_parseable_as_number = mean(!is.na(parse_number(price))) * 100,
    pct_has_letters = mean(str_detect(price, "[A-Za-z]")) * 100
  )

```

```{r}
#| label: check-real-price

# list columns that look like they might be price fields
names(enabled)[str_detect(names(enabled), "price")]

# check last_sold_price (this one IS numeric in your output)
enabled %>%
  summarise(
    missing_last_sold_price = mean(is.na(last_sold_price)) * 100,
    min_last_sold_price = min(last_sold_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_last_sold_price = median(last_sold_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_last_sold_price = max(last_sold_price, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: check-price-tolerance


enabled %>%
  count(quote_price_tolerance)


```
```{r}
#| label: drop-constant-features


```


```{r}
#| label: understand-diversity


enabled %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    columns = ncol(enabled),
    unique_skus = n_distinct(sku),
    unique_part_numbers = n_distinct(manufacturer_part_number),
    unique_brands = n_distinct(brand_default_title),
    unique_categories = n_distinct(category_default_title),
    unique_attribute_families = n_distinct(attribute_family_code)
  )
```

```{r}
#| identify-core-columns

enabled %>%
  count(brand_default_title, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)
```
```{r}

#| label: find-missing-data

enabled %>%
  summarise(across(everything(),
                   ~mean(is.na(.))*100)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to="column",
               values_to="percent_missing") %>%
  arrange(desc(percent_missing))
```

```{r}
#| label: duplicate-finding

enabled %>%
  count(manufacturer_part_number) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```

```{r}
#| label: constant-columns

enabled %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), n_distinct)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to="column",
               values_to="unique") %>%
  arrange(unique)

```

```{r}
#| label: find-inconsistent-formatting

enabled %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.character),
                   ~sum(grepl("^\\s|\\s$", .))))

```


```{r}
#| label: find-case-inconsist

enabled %>%
  distinct(brand_default_title) %>%
  mutate(lower = tolower(brand_default_title)) %>%
  count(lower) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

```

```{r}
#| label: manuf-number-incons

enabled %>%
  summarise(
    has_spaces =
      mean(grepl(" ", manufacturer_part_number)),

    has_lowercase =
      mean(grepl("[a-z]", manufacturer_part_number)),

    has_special =
      mean(grepl("[^A-Za-z0-9-]", manufacturer_part_number))
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: html-cleaning

enabled %>%
  summarise(
    html_desc =
      mean(grepl("<.*?>", descriptions_mro_value),
           na.rm=TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: zero-numeric-values

enabled %>%
  summarise(
    price_zero =
      mean(last_sold_price == 0,
           na.rm=TRUE),

    weight_zero =
      mean(item_weight == 0,
           na.rm=TRUE)
  )


```

```{r}
#| label: identify-outliers

enabled %>%
  summarise(
    price_99 =
      quantile(last_sold_price, .99, na.rm=TRUE),

    weight_99 =
      quantile(item_weight, .99, na.rm=TRUE)
  )

```

```{r}
#| label: are-each-category-name-trust

enabled %>%
  distinct(category_default_title) %>%
  arrange(category_default_title)


```



```{r}
#| label: check-similarity

enabled %>%
  count(price, brand_default_title, sort=TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n=30)
```

```{r}
#| label: category-size-distr

enabled %>%
  count(category_default_title) %>%
  summarise(
    smallest = min(n),
    median = median(n),
    largest = max(n)
  )

enabled %>%
  count(category_default_title) %>%
  ggplot(aes(n)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=50)
```

```{r}

#| label: attribute-distr

enabled %>%
  count(attribute_family_code, sort=TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: price-distr

enabled %>%
  ggplot(aes(last_sold_price)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=50)


enabled %>%
  ggplot(aes(last_sold_price)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=50) +
  scale_x_log10()
```

```{r}
#| label: weight-distr

enabled %>%
  ggplot(aes(item_weight)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=50)

enabled %>%
  ggplot(aes(item_weight)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=50) +
  scale_x_log10()


```
